title: Phase 1 validates role; Phase 2 re-extracts it independently — good decision to defend
description: The two-phase approach (validate_member_patch in Phase 1, apply SpaceMemberOp in Phase 2) correctly implements RFC 8620 §7.1 atomicity: if any patch path is invalid, neither the prop writes nor the member writes happen. The old code applied member patches inline after prop writes, so a mixed patch could partially apply. This is the right fix and worth defending if a contributor suggests 'simplifying' back to inline application.
